description: Outreach to an HVAC vendor for a routine inspection should ask about scheduling and cost.

task.title: Annual HVAC inspection
task.body: Schedule the annual HVAC system inspection for all units at Sunset Terrace. Last inspection was over 12 months ago.

context:
Property: Sunset Terrace, 920 Pine Ave, Portland, OR 97201
Units: 1A, 1B, 2A, 2B
Vendor: Northwest Heating & Air

criteria: Message asks when the vendor is available, not assigns a date
Message asks for pricing or a quote for the inspection
Message mentions the scope of work (HVAC inspection, multiple units)
Message mentions the property name or address
Message is an inquiry, not a work order or confirmation
Message is 2-3 sentences max, professional and friendly
